betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Fusion Reactor§f

§aThe ultimate power generation system — fuse light elements into heavier ones for enormous energy!§f

The §bFusion Reactor§f is a large, expensive, and advanced reactor that works by fusing light elements into heavier ones, producing immense heat and various byproducts. It is impossible to melt down — making it the safest high-power reactor.

§6Basic Setup§f:
§b• Plasma Vessel (Torus)§f — 15×15×5 multiblock, cooled with Perfluoromethyl
§b• Klystron§f — air-cooled radio frequency generator to ignite and sustain plasma

§6Components§f:
§b• Torus (Fusion Reactor Vessel)§f — main component, holds plasma and generates energy
  • 4 connection ports for external components
  • 3 input fluid slots + 1 output slot
  • Holds 4,000 mB fuel, 10 MHE electricity
  • Working speed: affected by buffered charge and fuel levels (<50% = slower)
§b• Klystron§f — converts HE to klystron energy (KyU) at 1:1 ratio
  • Up to §e1 MKyU/t§f output, holds 25 MHE + 150,000 mB compressed air
  • Below 50% = throttles; if output < torus requirement, plasma extinguishes
§b• Collector Chamber§f — boosts byproduct production by §e50%§f
§b• Breeding Chamber§f — uses neutron flux for materials (all RBMK irradiation recipes)
§b• Boiler§f — converts plasma energy to super dense steam (200 TU/mB)
§b• MHD Turbine§f — converts plasma to electricity directly (+35% bonus over boiling)
  • Requires 5 MTU/t minimum input, otherwise efficiency halved
  • Requires perfluoromethyl cooling
§b• Coupler§f — connects 2 tori, turns output plasma into input klystron energy
  • Essential for higher-tier plasmas that exceed 4× klystron capacity (4 MKyU/t)

§6Construction§f (per torus):
§b• 1×§f Core Component (Welded Cd Steel Plate + PVC + Versatile Circuit Board)
§b• 484×§f Superconducting BSCCO Coils
§b• 484×§f Cast Steel Plates
§b• 280×§f Fusion Piping Blocks
§b• 160×§f Fusion Blankets (Tungsten + Steel + Beryllium)
§b• 1×§f Blowtorch or Welding Torch

§eTip§f: Start with Deuterium plasma (cheapest) and work up to Deuterium-Tritium. Multiple tori can be daisy-chained with couplers for higher-tier plasmas!
